basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist- II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi has released the official notification for 1 Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Delhi. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age relaxation as per rules

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in psychology/ public health/ social work/ sociology/ nursing with three years of experience OR PhD
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical): Essential: Post graduate degree, including the integrated PG degree in psychology/ public health/ social work/ sociology/ nursing with three years of experience OR PhD (psychology/ public health/ social work/ sociology/ nursing). Desirable: Prior experience of research work in the area of mental health and addictive disorders.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) recruitment is 26 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) post at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Essential qualification is a Post Graduate degree in psychology/ public health/ social work/ sociology/ nursing with three years of experience OR a PhD in the same fields. Desirable experience is in mental health and addictive disorders research.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 years and 35 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist- II (Non-Medical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 87,100/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Delhi.
